module.name: Org Base — Salesforce context sidecar
module.blurb: Read-only base sidecar: pulls org schema, metadata, a dependency graph, and a security audit into GitHub as reviewable history. Deploys nothing.

workflows.name: Collect Org Context
workflows.blurb: Full read-only snapshot: schema + metadata + dependency graph + permissions audit, committed back.

workflows.name: Retrieve Metadata
workflows.blurb: Source-format metadata tree committed to org/metadata.

workflows.name: Analyze Dependencies
workflows.blurb: Component dependency graph + package map (JSON + SVG).

workflows.name: Audit Permissions
workflows.blurb: Cedar security analysis to findings JSON + SARIF.

workflows.name: Query Org
workflows.blurb: One declarative sf action in the nono capability sandbox.
